package rulecoverage

func PositiveRepositoryLogsWithHttpStatusOrRouteLabels() string {
    ruleID := "repository_logs_with_http_status_or_route_labels"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Repositories that log transport metadata instead of persistence-domain details."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
